creator: eborisch+FreeBSD@gmail.com
text:
This has cropped up again:

* Repeatably crashes immediately if I start and then 'rotate' to the 'rules'
  view or select '5' or '6'.

* If I start with the 'rules' view (pfctl -v rules), it is intermittent:
  * often works
  * sometimes crashes immediately with "Bus error (core dumped)"
  * sometimes has corruption in the display. For example, one time it printed
    this for a rule:


  27  32       Any     Q !lo0   ipcomp             0        0        0       pass inet6 from any to (null)/128 port = ntp group  flags FUE/RAUE tos 0x70 frag


when it should be:


  27  Pass     In        lo0    udp       K        0        0        0       inet6 from any to fe80::1/128 port = ntp


Version info:

# freebsd-version
14.1-RELEASE-p6

# uname -a
FreeBSD mr-gw.mayo.edu 14.1-RELEASE-p5 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p5 GENERIC amd64

# pkg info pftop libpfctl
pftop-0.10_1
libpfctl-0.13
